prompt: Create a systems resiliency governance diagram titled 'Self-Healing Systems Need Governance'. Show detection -> diagnosis -> proposed remediation -> authority check -> automatic action, approval, or escalation -> verification -> rollback if needed -> audit record. Surround the loop with boundaries for safe automatic actions, approval-required actions, forbidden actions, stop conditions, observability, and accountable ownership. Use vendor-neutral SRE architecture styling.
proof_boundaries: Do not name specific products or imply current self-healing capabilities.
Do not claim quantified incident-duration or cost reductions.
Do not imply autonomous remediation is suitable for every failure class.
